articles.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
articles.excerpt: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
articles.what_this_means: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

articles.title: GT Bowlers Need Consistency: Hayden's IPL 2026 Reality Check
articles.what_this_means: Gujarat Titans need urgent course correction. Matthew Hayden is demanding discipline from bowlers (nine wides is too many) and aggressive batting (seven sixes isn't enough). In IPL 2026, these basics will determine if GT stays competitive.

articles.title: Ranveer Singh's Pralay: New Bollywood Movie 2025 Post-Apocalyptic Epic
articles.what_this_means: Ranveer Singh's upcoming film Prayal is an original post-apocalyptic concept (not an adaptation) directed by Hansal Mehta. This ambitious new Bollywood movie 2025 will likely hit theaters first before streaming on Netflix India or Prime Video. For diaspora audiences, it promises fresh, large-scale Indian storytelling unlike typical Bollywood fare.

articles.title: Bangladesh Cricket: Mehidy, Litton Captains Until 2027 World Cups
articles.what_this_means: Bangladesh locks in Mehidy Hasan Miraz and Litton Das as ODI and T20I captains until 2027 World Cups, signaling strategic stability. Mohammad Rafique joins as spin consultant for one year. For US-based Indian diaspora fans, this move shows how South Asian cricket boards are investing in long-term planning and specialized coaching.

articles.title: Grok AI Prompt Generator: Best AI Tool for 2026
articles.what_this_means: Grok AI now auto-generates detailed prompts for image and video creation, making visual content generation 2-3x faster. For Indian engineers in the US, this is a productivity lever that affects portfolio building, side projects, and machine learning salary conversations. It's also a real alternative to ChatGPT for creative workflow automation in 2026.
